title: Authorize RPL control senders
description: Resolve node-level review findings: reject foreign-instance/DODAG DIOs before neighbor-table mutation, and carry authenticated IPv6 sender identity into DAO processing so a peer cannot advertise another node's target or poison its replay state. Define the allowed target-to-sender relationship from existing IPv6/IID identity rules and fail closed before route mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Foreign DIO scope causes no neighbor mutation; spoofed DAO targets from another authenticated sender are rejected before replay/edge/route mutation; legitimate self-target and forwarding cases are explicitly tested against protocol identity rules; RPL/node tests and Clippy pass; three reviews pass.
close_reason: Fixed per bead: early foreign DIO rejection in dodag::process_dio:277 and sender_is_authorized before replay in routing::process_signature_verified_inner:1482. No neighbor/route mutations on unauthorized inputs. RPL and node tests pass.
